leadText: Not to be confused with Black Belt. The Expert Belt (Japanese: たつじんのおび Expert Obi) is a type of held item introduced in Generation IV that strengthens supereffective attacks.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Boosts the damage of the holder's supereffective moves by 20% (approximated as a multiplier of 4915/4096 from Generation V to Pokémon Scarlet and Violet ).

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a well-worn belt that slightly boosts the power of supereffective moves. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a well-worn belt that slightly boosts the power of supereffective moves. S V ZA An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a well-worn belt that slightly boosts the power of the holder's supereffective moves.
